title: ART - Agentic Resume Tailor
context: Automatic resume tailoring with agentic workflows, RAG-backed rewriting with strict factual guardrails.
description: Built an automatic tailoring system using React and FastAPI, utilizing SQLite for data persistence and ChromaDB for vector retrieval to generate single-page PDF/TeX artifacts.
Designed a multi-agent loop (Query → Retrieve → Rewrite → Score) with iterative boost terms, optimizing content coverage against Job Description requirements.
Implemented rewrite safety guardrails to prevent hallucinations (semantic-drift checks, fact-freezing), ensuring 100% adherence to original resume facts while adapting tone.

title: StyleDiT: A Unified Framework for Diverse Child and Partner Faces Synthesis with Style Latent Diffusion Transformer
context: Novel diffusion model architecture for high-fidelity face synthesis across diverse demographics
description: Proposed Style Latent Diffusion Transformer (DiT), a novel architecture combining latent diffusion models with transformer-based attention mechanisms for enhanced face synthesis.
Achieved state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, demonstrating superior fidelity and diversity in generated images across various demographics.

title: ZapMail: AI-Driven Email Automation Platform
context: AI-assisted outbound email automation at scale, high-volume background processing with Rails + Sidekiq.
description: Architected an email automation platform in Ruby on Rails, integrating GPT-4o to generate personalized content.
Engineered a scalable background processing system using Sidekiq and Redis to manage high-volume async delivery.
Spearheaded the adoption of TDD/BDD principles across a 4-developer team, enforcing comprehensive RSpec/Cucumber test coverage to prevent regression in critical workflows.

title: Sentiment Aware Chatroom Monitor
context: Real-time moderation system for detecting toxic messages, team-led NLP pipeline with BERT fine-tuning and live alerts.
description: Designed and built a real-time system to detect toxic messages using sentiment analysis, leading a team of 4 engineers.
Fine-tuned a pre-trained Chinese BERT model on a custom dataset of chat logs, achieving 87% accuracy and increasing toxic message classification AUC by 36%.
Engineered a full-stack solution with a Python backend and WebSocket-based frontend alerts, enabling users to take immediate action on flagged content.

title: Reposted Marker - LinkedIn Job Screening Extension
context: Chrome/Edge browser extension that detects reposted LinkedIn job listings and surfaces the signal directly in the jobs list before users waste time opening low-value posts.
description: Built a Manifest V3 browser extension that highlights reposted LinkedIn jobs in both the left-side results list and the right-side detail panel, with badge-based UI cues and resilient DOM detection.

Designed a hybrid detection system combining visible-page parsing, job ID extraction, local cache reuse, and background prefetch so unresolved jobs can be classified asynchronously before users click into them.

Implemented a bounded priority queue with viewport-aware prefetch windowing, rate-limit backoff, retry control, and cache policy coordination to keep the extension responsive while avoiding excessive LinkedIn requests.
Added a popup control menu with live runtime settings, queue/cache diagnostics, rescan and cache-clear actions, and exportable debug logs to support both end users and maintainability.

title: Kuiz - Educational Video Platform
context: TikTok-inspired learning platform with swipe navigation, award-winning build for Meichu Hackathon.
description: Led a 5-member team to win 1st Prize at Meichu Hackathon by developing a TikTok-inspired educational platform.
Built a mobile-first frontend with swipe navigation and VOD playback optimized for learning.
Developed a FastAPI backend with authentication, video tagging, and playlist endpoints deployed to Firebase.
Improved user engagement by implementing a neural collaborative filtering recommendation engine.

title: Conversation Series Manager
context: End-to-end conversation-program operations platform with public booking, multi-admin availability management, and an internal session workspace.
description: Built a full-stack operations app for running structured conversation sessions, including public registration, participant CRM, reusable question bank, session management, and dashboard analytics.

Designed a when2meet-style scheduling flow where admins publish availability and participants can reserve only future blocks backed by at least two available admins, with Firestore transactions ensuring slot/session consistency.

Developed a live session workspace with notes, Google Meet logistics, auto-synced status tracking, message generation, and a combined pacing coach plus conversation timer to support real-time facilitation.

title: Stock-Tracker: Asset Dashboard
context: Real-time portfolio and allocation monitoring with RLS support and Supabase Auth.
description: Built “Asset Dashboard,” a secure, real-time portfolio tracker with Supabase magic-link auth and live Finnhub market data.
Designed an asset allocation view with interactive pie chart, smart color system, and responsive legend for clear holdings breakdown.
Added portfolio insights (net worth, cash/buying power, daily value) plus symbol validation to prevent bad data.
Implemented JSON import/export for backup or migration, optimized for desktop and mobile UX.
